glue.crawler.mongodbtarget.CfnAbout: Specifies an Amazon DocumentDB or MongoDB data store to crawl.

glue.crawler.mongodbtarget.ConnectionNam.Description: The name of the connection to use to connect to the Amazon DocumentDB or MongoDB target.

glue.crawler.mongodbtarget.Path.Description: The path of the Amazon DocumentDB or MongoDB target (database/collection).
